recommendations: SM Occupancy is low (5%). Kernel is likely register- or shared-memory limited. Try larger batch sizes or review kernel launch configurations.
Tensor core utilisation is low (2%). Ensure inputs are in BF16/FP16/FP8 and matrix dimensions are multiples of 16 (ideally 128) for Tensor Core alignment.
VRAM utilisation is very high (91%). Risk of OOM — consider quantization, smaller context length, or KV cache offloading.
